ramune.sgum.upgradesummary:
Speed: {0} | Efficiency: {1} | Boost: {2}
Battery Swap: {3} | Light: 0 | Noise: 0
ramune.sgum.batteryswapupgrade.name: Seaglide battery swap upgrade
ramune.sgum.batteryswapupgrade.desc: Adds a built-in battery storage which is used to automatically swap out depleted batteries for charged ones. Each upgrade adds <color=#01f8f8>+1 slot</color> to your battery storage. Seaglide compatible. Does stack.
ramune.sgum.boostupgrade.name: Seaglide boost upgrade
ramune.sgum.boostupgrade.desc: While active, enhances mobility at the cost of greatly increased battery usage. Seaglide compatible. Does not stack.
ramune.sgum.efficiencyupgrade.name: Seaglide efficiency upgrade
ramune.sgum.efficiencyupgrade.desc: Recycles heat by-product to minimize power inefficiencies. Seaglide compatible. Does stack.
ramune.sgum.lightupgrade.name: Seaglide light upgrade
ramune.sgum.lightupgrade.desc: Increases the power supplied to the Seaglide's lights, enhancing both range and area of illumination. Seaglide compatible. Does stack.
ramune.sgum.noisedampeningupgrade.name: Seaglide noise dampening upgrade
ramune.sgum.noisedampeningupgrade.desc: Reduces the noise generated by the Seaglide, lowering the risk of hearing damage during extended use. Seaglide compatible. Does not stack.
ramune.sgum.speedupgrade.name: Seaglide speed upgrade
ramune.sgum.speedupgrade.desc: Increases maximum speed at the cost of increased battery usage. Seaglide compatible. Does stack.
ramune.sgum.powerglideupgrade.name: Seaglide powerglide upgrade
ramune.sgum.powerglideupgrade.desc: Transforms the Seaglide into an ultra high-speed propulsion device, increasing speed by 10x without any penalties. Seaglide compatible. Does not stack.
